description_long: This object is a futuristic laptop with a hard, rectangular black case that opens to reveal a transparent, blue-tinted display and keyboard. The screen is large and semi-transparent, featuring a digital interface with circular and rectangular UI elements, suggesting advanced technology. The keyboard is also semi-transparent blue, with visible key outlines and a sleek, modern design. The base of the laptop is robust and dark, with a handle on the front, indicating portability. The exterior of the case is matte black with subtle wear, while the interior is more visually complex with illuminated elements. The overall design is compact, portable, and visually striking, suitable for high-tech urban environments.
description: A sleek, futuristic laptop with a black hard case, transparent blue screen, and keyboard, featuring illuminated digital interface elements.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open black case, transparent blue screen, and keyboard with illuminated UI elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the screen and keyboard, and the robust base structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed black case and the back of the transparent screen and keyboard.
description_view_3: Back-left view showing the open case, the hinge mechanism, and the interior layout of the laptop.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and on, displaying a digital interface with various UI elements.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout, no numeric keypad, function row present, keys are semi-transparent and illuminated.
